title: 日本ダービーの後に・私の夢の次は

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I won... I won the Derby...

text_block_list.name: Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: Skyyyy! You were astounding!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? Gramps?! You came?!

text_block_list.name: Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
That there's my grandchild! Isn't she cute? And
what a racer!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Uh, y-yes sir!

text_block_list.name: Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
You made my dream come true! You're the
greatest grandkid this old man could ever ask for!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Stop, you're embarrassing me... You probably
can't even hear me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heheh... Your dream came true, huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Congratulations, Sei. Really... congrats!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But next time... I'll win... I'll win the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Your dreams might not have come true, but
you're still looking forward.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You're really something, Spe.

Seiun Sky gains an impressive win in the Derby,
leaving the racing world speculating on what this
means.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky pulled out ahead this time, but Special
Week will make up for it later!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
That's right, she's the real deal! My eyes are on
Spe for the next race too! Everything will be
different this summer!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Spe sure is popular.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
She's always consistent. Considering that
alongside her growth, I think I'm already out of
options.
choice_data_list: But you're the one who won.
But you're the one who won.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but... I agree with what they're saying. She's
still improving.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Guess that just means I have to get better before
the Kikuka Sho too... Psh, yeah right.

With the last race of the Classic Triple Crown on
the horizon, the Umamusume welcome in the
coming summer.
